title: MAXIM LED Bulbs [Pack of 10] Type: Candle (Day Light) 6Watts (40Watts) / Pearl Finish / 25 000 Hours/Energy Saving Multipack 40MLCE27D5X10
description: Pack of 10 MAXIM bulbs (Type: CANDLE) with an average life of 25,000 hours. The CANDLE LED lamp provides a Day Light light instantly at the flick of a switch, offering immediate fantastic savings in power usage and lifespan. With a clean and elegant anti-shatter design, it is the perfect replacement for traditional halogen lamps. Non-dimmable.
